summary: Verified dark/light theme toggle feature on portfolio site (https://anil-devops.preview.emergentagent.com). All 10 acceptance criteria pass: site loads in DARK by default (html.dark, body rgb(10,14,23), localStorage 'anil-theme'='dark'); desktop [data-testid='theme-toggle'] visible; clicking switches to LIGHT (html.light, body rgb(250,250,249), localStorage 'light'); preference persists across reload; toggle back to dark works; mobile (414x900) shows BOTH [data-testid='theme-toggle-mobile'] and hamburger and mobile toggle flips theme; About narrative paragraphs render in light mode with slate-600 (rgb(71,85,105)) on near-white bg (good contrast, previously buggy area now fixed); brand accents green (#10B981) & cyan (#38BDF8) preserved in both themes; nav anchor scrolling works in light (projects scrollY=2478); mailto and LinkedIn CTAs intact; ZERO console errors during toggle/reload cycle.
critical_code_review_comments: ThemeProvider correctly toggles html.light/html.dark classes and persists to localStorage('anil-theme'). Initial state reads from localStorage with safe SSR guard. Clean implementation.
Navigation exposes both desktop (theme-toggle) and mobile (theme-toggle-mobile) buttons with proper data-testid, aria-label, and Sun/Moon icon swap based on current theme. Good a11y.

Minor: the about.yaml terminal/code card retains its dark chrome in light mode (visible in screenshot). This appears intentional (terminal aesthetic) and not a bug, but worth confirming with design intent - all text inside it remains readable on its dark background.

Minor: nav header still uses bg-[#0A0E17]/80 scrolled state hardcoded - in light mode the scrolled nav background remains dark navy. Since current scroll position at top renders transparent, this is only visible when scrolled. Consider a light variant override via .light selector in index.css if a fully light nav-on-scroll is desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme toggle feature fully verified. Key signals: html.dark + body rgb(10,14,23) for dark; html.light + body rgb(250,250,249) for light. About paragraph text color in light = rgb(71,85,105) (slate-600) which fixes the previous white-on-white bug. localStorage key = 'anil-theme'. Desktop testid = 'theme-toggle', mobile testid = 'theme-toggle-mobile'. No console errors. Screenshots confirm hero/about/skills/contact all readable in light mode and brand green/cyan accents preserved. Skip retesting unless theme/nav code changes. Minor nav-on-scroll-dark-in-light note documented as enhancement, not bug.
rca of the issue: n/a - feature verification only, no bugs reproduced.
